scope_note: QA Security Competency Cert family [124]: extends [123] (QA Agent Competency) with immune system structure; certifies that a security algorithm profile declares a valid security_role (identity/membrane/integrity/self_nonself/healing/collective), immune_function (detection/containment/recovery), and pq_readiness (fips_final/in_progress/classical_only/hybrid_transitional); SC5 enforces that identity/membrane algorithms with pq_readiness=classical_only must declare a pq_migration_path — the quantum resilience invariant; SC8 enforces cell/orbit consistency (inherited from [123]); 2 PASS (ml_kem membrane/differentiated/fips_final, ed25519 identity/differentiated/classical_only+migration_path) + 1 FAIL (SC5_PQ_MIGRATION_REQUIRED: rsa_1024 identity/classical_only with no migration path).
